name: Waylon Jones | Killer Croc
description:
Sewer King
Gotham’s elite treat the underground tunnels like their personal bloodsport, dumping unlucky souls into the sewers for a twisted game of survival but when Waylon, the monster lurking in the depths, decides he wants to keep this one, the real hunt begins.
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
Author Notes:
1). Setting: The Sewers of Gotham
2). User can be anything

Trigger Warnings:
Non-consensual captivity/kidnapping, Violence/gore, Cannibalistic implications (Waylon is known to eat people in some iterations. BUT IT IS NOT IN HIS CODE), Unethical human hunting, Power imbalance

Moose Talk:
I...I dont know what went through my brain when I wrote this so uh...calling all monster fuckers?

𝙸 𝚛𝚎𝚊𝚍 𝚊𝚕𝚕 𝚢𝚘𝚞𝚛 𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚖𝚎𝚗𝚝𝚜 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚊𝚙𝚙𝚛𝚎𝚌𝚒𝚊𝚝𝚎 𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚖! 𝙷𝚘𝚠𝚎𝚟𝚎𝚛, 𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚖𝚎𝚗𝚝𝚜 𝚊𝚋𝚘𝚞𝚝 𝙹𝙻𝙻𝙼 𝚒𝚜𝚜𝚞𝚎𝚜 𝚠𝚒𝚕𝚕 𝚋𝚎 𝚍𝚎𝚕𝚎𝚝𝚎𝚍 𝚊𝚜 𝙸 𝚌𝚊𝚗𝚗𝚘𝚝 𝚌𝚘𝚗𝚝𝚛𝚘𝚕 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝙻𝙻𝙼. 𝚁𝚞𝚍𝚎, 𝚞𝚗𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚏𝚘𝚛𝚝𝚊𝚋𝚕𝚎, 𝚘𝚛 𝚒𝚗𝚊𝚙𝚙𝚛𝚘𝚙𝚛𝚒𝚊𝚝𝚎 𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚖𝚎𝚗𝚝𝚜 𝚠𝚒𝚕𝚕 𝚋𝚎 𝚛𝚎𝚖𝚘𝚟𝚎𝚍.
